item.name: Bigcuda
item.description:
A king among bicuda, and lord of the waters of Ksiroda.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Although bicuda are known for their magnitude, the bigcuda dwarfs its kin. It defends its place in its species' size-based hierarchy─and commensurate territory─with a ferocity bordering on the savage, though theories that it has thinned out the competition by taking bites out of its kin remain unsubstantiated.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - Ilsabard and the Northern Empty
